signals.headline: Ethereum Price Jumps 14% Amid Geopolitical Tensions, Boosting Polymarket Odds to 56% YES for $4,000 by April End | YES |
signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Jumps 14% Amid Geopolitical Tensions, Boosting Polymarket Odds to 56% YES for $4,000 by April End | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

Polymarket's "Ethereum price in April" market updated to 56% YES for ETH hitting $4,000 by April 30 following a 14% weekly surge, driven by de-escalation in Trump-Iran tensions and large trades (20-point spike at 1:49 PM UTC, $182K USDC volume in 24h).[1]
